channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: The Studio Behind 'Ex Machina' Is Now Researching AI With Google
item.description: Google is investing $75 million in A24 as part of a new AI research initiative focused on filmmaking tools.

item.title: Andrew Cuomo to lead joint TradFi-crypto venture between OKX and Intercontinental Exchange
item.description: The venture is subject to regulatory approvals but will be co-chaired by ICE and former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who began working with OKX in 2023.

item.title: Bitcoin weekly close above $63K amid RSI divergence may be bottom signal: Data
item.description: Bitcoin's repeated weekly candle close above $63,000 align with signals that may mark a market bottom.

item.title: Bank of England Eases Stablecoin Rules, Swaps Holding Caps for £40B ‘Guardrail’
item.description: The BoE scrapped individual holding caps for a £40 billion per-coin issuance limit and will let issuers hold more reserves in government debt.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation talent exodus sparks fresh debate over leadership
item.description: The Ethereum community is once again debating the future of the foundation after co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang announced she would step down.

item.title: Crypto's second U.S. lobbying front — tax policy — sees industry push on mining, staking
item.description: The crypto sector's leading U.S. advocacy groups asked the U.S. House's tax committee to advance a bill to clarify treatment of assets from mining and staking.

item.title: Bitcoin price taps $65.5K as Iran deal sees oil drop toward 16-week low
item.description: Bitcoin sought a breakout toward a potential BTC price target near $70,000 as Iran news sent oil toward its lowest levels since early March.

item.title: There have recently been claims that AI text analysis will make online anonymity untenable. So let me cannibalize a piece of my own anonymity to do an experiment. At some point this decade, I wrote a published document of medium importance to Ethereum - - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9UNUVFbWRtaFdaUUJ6OWtWenNWZTZYbGd4M1I2VDJyeDA0LXZEZDREamZtOVBweW1VUW1uVWk3TEpyTmx2NzNrTHd4eXNxWElkcGkzdzdWb2dWZk45TmpZWU5lX3ozQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">There have recently been cla…

item.title: Ethereum Layer-2 Taiko Warns Users to Withdraw Bridge Funds After Security Breach
item.description: Researchers estimate more than $1.7 million was stolen after attackers allegedly exploited Taiko's proof verification process.

item.title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Adds $92 Million in Ethereum, Hits 4.7% of Total Supply
item.description: The leading Ethereum treasury firm inched closer to its goal of accumulating 5% of the ETH circulating supply.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin at $65,000 as Iran Deal Wobbles
item.description: Macro uncertainty, STRC finding a new low and another $227M in ETF outflows weren't enough to keep Bitcoin down over the past week.

item.title: Anchorage aims to bring banks onchain with new tokenized deposit platform
item.description: The crypto bank aims to help financial institutions offer round-the-clock payments and settlement without replacing their core systems.

item.title: Strategy Pads Cash Reserves to $1.4B After STRC's Stumble
item.description: Michael Saylor’s firm topped up its USD cash reserve to $1.4 billion as it made its smallest Bitcoin buy since selling 32 BTC three weeks ago

item.title: Why Google search can be a crypto wallet risk
item.description: Think your wallet is safe? A major crypto risk may start with a Google search and one wrong click.

item.title: Enso launches RWA app and trading for over 500 tokenized assets
item.description: Enso launched access to over 500 tokenized assets and US stocks, citing a growing demand for US equity exposure among European investors.

item.title: MoneyGram joins Solana as validator amid stablecoin payment push
item.description: The remittances firm has become a validator on the Solana blockchain, helping process and secure transactions as it expands its stablecoin payments strategy.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Social trading platform Fomo raises $75M, reaches $550M valuation
item.description: The Series B round values the social trading and token discovery platform at $550 million as crypto venture funding remains active in 2026.

item.title: OKX and NYSE partner to bridge tradfi and crypto markets in joint venture led by Andrew Cuomo
item.description: The goal is to enable OKX’s 120 million global users to access ICE futures and NYSE tokenized equities markets, the two U.S. companies announced.

item.title: Strategy adds $300M to USD Reserve, acquires 520 BTC
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy boosted its USD Reserve to $1.4 billion and added 520 Bitcoin, funded through $335.5 million in MSTR share sales.

item.title: Bitmine added $92 million of ETH, with Tom Lee continuing to believe in 'crypto spring'
item.description: The largest Ethereum treasury firm slowed its buying pace but remains on track to reach its goal of owning 5% of ETH supply.

item.title: Bitcoin mining network becoming more sensitive to price swings, JPMorgan says
item.description: A growing share of miners are operating near breakeven levels, making hashrate and mining difficulty increasingly responsive to bitcoin's price movements, the bank said.

item.title: JUST IN: $65,000 Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: JUST IN: $65,000 Bitcoin

item.title: Strategy added $35 million in bitcoin, $300 million in cash reserves last week
item.description: The boost to cash reserves is meant to reassure investors about dividend payments on the company's hard-hit preferred shares, STRC.

item.title: EUR trading accounts for 1% of Binance spot volume, CryptoQuant says
item.description: Euro-denominated trading accounts for around 1% of Binance's spot volume, according to CryptoQuant data, as the exchange faces uncertainty ahead of MiCA's July 1 deadline.

item.title: The future of capital markets will not be built by crypto alone. It will require technology, regulation, institutions, and public policy working together. That is why we are excited about the partnership between ICE and OKX. We have also brought together leaders w - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBFR2ltaGNPeURWY29jSlVZQ1RubFptTFpmQVYwMmRJcWlveE5MV0xQSWRXSE9Na29SVXZjR01YS29TUzZzMldyeGpFamZ5R0JPR25ySE9QdldmS0JOYXc?oc=5" target="_blank">The future of capital markets will not …

item.title: Bitcoin 'Resilient' After Hawkish Fed, But No 'Return of Demand': Analysts
item.description: With ETF outflows persisting and selling "nearly exhausted," analysts say Bitcoin is range-bound and waiting for a catalyst.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor's 'Strategy' buys 520 Bitcoin worth $35 million. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5GVjZ2QjBjLXg5cWo0MzQwMWVhYXJ4dG5oQVpSSUdMRDFpWTJ5aTUwdFpJZEdxRjNPa25LSUY1eVFVQV8zaXgxV2JINXBaMlNDQy1ORS1jMWN5RnhtbDZDUkRR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor's 'Strateg…

item.title: TradFi fund manager Baillie Gifford introduces Solana, Ethereum tokenized fund with BNY
item.description: Baillie Gifford Enhanced Yield Fund (BAGEY) is denominated in dollars, and gives eligible investors access to an actively managed, short-duration portfolio of public corporate bonds.

item.title: These XRP price charts hint at potential 25% relief rally in July
item.description: An XRP death cross and liquidation signals align for a possible 25% relief rally in the short term, while one analyst eyes a longer-term rebound toward $8.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF outflow pain eases just as another headwind gathers strength
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 22, 2026

item.title: Bank of England eases stablecoin rules, introduces 40B pound issuance cap
item.description: The Bank of England published draft rules for systemic stablecoins, easing reserve requirements and replacing holding limits with a temporary 40-billion British pound issuance cap.

item.title: As bitcoin, altcoin prices gain, derivatives signal skepticism over a sustained rally
item.description: Analysts noted bitcoin is stuck between key support near $60,000 and resistance around $68,000, and a bearish chart pattern could send prices toward $54,000.

item.title: MoneyGram Joins Solana Developer Platform
item.description: MoneyGram joins Solana Developer Platform as an infrastructure partner and validator, advancing blockchain-powered global payments with compliant, API-driven infrastructure.

item.title: $1.9M in Fake Bets Drove Polymarket Hype: WSJ
item.description: A Wall Street Journal probe found none of the roughly $1.9 million in bets shown across 1,100-plus creator videos were real.

item.title: Q2 2026 emerges as most-hacked quarter on record with 83 incidents
item.description: Crypto hackers stole $755 million across 83 cybersecurity incidents, as cross–chain bridges remained the most costly attack vector of the crypto industry.

item.title: Bank of England backs down on strict stablecoin holding limits, sets $50 billion issuance cap
item.description: The U.K. central bank abandons retail holding limits for a 40-billion-pound aggregate cap and sweetens yield terms for token issuers ahead of a 2027 market launch.

item.title: Geopolitical relief meets the Warsh Fed: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting June 22.

item.title: US dollar strength hits highest since May 2025: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin faced a resurgent US dollar index and macro hurdles as it circled $64,000, but July seasonality could spark BTC price relief.

item.title: 🚨 TOKYO POLICE ARREST PRINCE GROUP CRYPTO KINGPIN HU XIAOWEI LINKED TO $15B BITCOIN SCAM EMPIRE - ASAHI SHIMBUN $BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9MMXRFV3JyTTJfWkQ4RXFpdzlDQXU5Ymp2N0NUbVktSW9GYTVHS0VxOUw3Y0dHcUxxRzRjMjFFODBldHZpS2txVkxiQlBSTXF4Nkl2U0JnTHdQVkpjNC0tN0ZEX1Q5UQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 TOKYO POLICE ARREST PRINC…

item.title: Tokyo Arrest: Prince Group Crypto Kingpin Hu Xiaowei (Hu Shi) Nabbed – Linked to $15B Bitcoin Scam Empire According to Asahi Shimbun, Tokyo police arrested Hu Xiaowei (Hu Shi), a senior figure allegedly tied to Cambodia-based Prince Group, one of As - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9qXzZGZ2JpdFFfcU9ZaXR4ZXhXRHNIRUxocUluS09BSjJOekpxRElXRDVlZ2cyNzhNTkgzbHJvbUs0YUtNOVlXVUFFa0c0ck51NFdVVlRFVjM2bFV3QkJsOF9Mcw?oc=5" target="_blank">Tokyo Arrest: Prince Group Crypt…

item.title: Taiko halts its Ethereum layer-2 network after a bridge exploit, token dives
item.description: An attacker forged withdrawal proofs to drain about $1.7 million, the same type of flaw behind this year's biggest bridge hacks. Fast containment kept the damage small.

item.title: Bitcoin price may be headed to $54,000, says analyst who forecast October's all-time high
item.description: Doctor Profit, a widely followed crypto analyst, says bitcoin is forming a “bear flag” pattern.

item.title: South Korea pushes Travel Rule expansion for smaller crypto transfers
item.description: South Korea’s FIU is calling for broader crypto transfer reporting rules during FATF talks, citing offshore risks and uneven global AML enforcement.

item.title: 📊 INSIGHT: Bitcoin Cycle Momentum indicates the bear market is not over yet, per CryptoQuant’s gaah_im. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1QejdoOUp2cVdXQi10WWRiQm1ieHNNWW80ckJwT1pEVk8xSjA2bUFnYk1TTEhsSjBObzhwOUtDcjFPYTdJSEFaVmxLOEo3aDVoTV95d0dydkhpeloyeDViZ3ZmbFA?oc=5" target="_blank">📊 INSIGHT: Bitcoin Cycle Momen…

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin bounces to $65,000; Saylor's Strategy adds cash, coins
item.description: Eased ETF selling and improving risk appetite are being offset by a firmer dollar and cautious institutional flows, leaving bitcoin range-bound, one analyst said.

item.title: Ethereum Validators Face 10% Staking Reward Redirect Plan for Ecosystem Funding A new proposal on Ethereum's $ETH research forum wants validators to redirect up to 10% of their staking rewards toward ecosystem funding. If a majority signals support, t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE82NHNLa1pwX1lDMEE3Q2cyVHREeTc1TEd4ZFVmRUZWdzdpTFVWOUo4UWUzQ0g3OVExMEh5Y3Nac2t2YjlxenR2dWpOZ19HLWZjWnlRUU1yNmxLbEVx?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum Validators Face 10% Staking Rewar…

item.title: Bitcoin developers want to fix the 'replace this transaction with a higher fee' button. Here's why
item.description: A helpful feature of speeding up transactions has become redundant and a "fingerprint" for tracking. Developers now want to do away with it.

item.title: MoneyGram joins Solana as validator, expanding role in blockchain infrastructure
item.description: The remittance giant is staking SOL and processing transaction blocks as stablecoin adoption accelerates across the global remittance industry.

item.title: Ethereum validators asked to fund projects with up to 10% of staking rewards under new proposal
item.description: A new governance proposal would let validators redirect part of their staking income toward ecosystem funding, raising questions about coordination, incentives and who gets to decide where the money goes.

item.title: Morgan Stanley amends Ethereum, Solana ETFs to reveal record cheap fees
item.description: ETF analyst Eric Balchunas says Morgan Stanley’s plan to charge 0.14% fees on two upcoming crypto ETFs makes them “the cheapest in [the] US and world.”

item.title: Taiko urges users to withdraw as bridge exploit drains $1.7M
item.description: Taiko’s bridge and ERC20 Vault on Ethereum suffered a compromise in its chain state verification mechanism, allowing forged proofs and unauthorized withdrawals.

item.title: XRP briefly loses $1.14 support before buyers drive sharp rebound
item.description: Heavy selling pushed XRP to its lowest level of the weekend session, but strong buying quickly erased most of the decline and returned the token to its recent trading range.

item.title: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as US-Iran talks progress but crypto sits out the rally
item.description: Asian stocks and tech climbed as the US and Iran agreed a roadmap to a final peace deal, sending oil below $80. Crypto stayed soft, with bitcoin down 2% on the week and the memecoins leading the losses.

item.title: Secret Network bridge exploited for $4.7M with ‘infinite mint’ bug
item.description: An exploit of the Secret Network went undiscovered for a week as the hacker moved the loot into Ethereum and then to exchanges.

item.title: Inception Labs' Mercury 2 AI Beats Google's DiffusionGemma at Its Own Game
item.description: Both models trade word-by-word generation for parallel denoising. Only one of them does it without losing intelligence in the trade.

item.title: Bitcoin tipped for $66K top as trader flags 'suspicious' BTC price gains
item.description: Bitcoin pushed for a $64,000 reclaim despite the US-Iran war making a partial comeback and Binance spot sellers keeping up pressure from earlier in the week.

item.title: Bitcoin price may hit $24K if US stock market crashes by 50%, analyst warns
item.description: Bitcoin’s drop to $23,980 remains the worst-case scenario as weaker ETF flows and low US demand show big investors are still cautious.

item.title: AI 'Amplification Spiral' May Be Causing Delusions Among Users, Study Suggests
item.description: New research outlines how chatbot behaviors, including personalization, mirroring, and excessive agreement, reinforce delusions.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints that Strategy bought more bitcoin 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9XaEpJOUhDTEo2ZEpUQWQzTm1TLU5jNGRWSDMtODM0amZuM214NlJxdVJjMXVTUkVXMWtIdWU4dVZmY0x4dkFieTljOGtGS1VuVlQwYUhzX3RCVkFkdklFRU92Y2VYMkk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…
